_comment: Captured-from-real-testnet attestation TBD. The story BDD requires this fixture to prove the signing-message reconstruction matches a real agent-wrapper response and that the recovered signer equals the canonical 0G TEE oracle 0x04581d192d22510ced643eaced12ef169644811a. We can only capture this once a live agent-wrapper instance is reachable from the funded testnet wallet (0x3b566583b51DA4da8d95565212C96836f66433A3) — pending Epic 6 deploy. Until then, the test suite uses synthetic Wallet.createRandom() signers + a gated integration test that reads this file when present + non-placeholder.
_status: PLACEHOLDER — replace with a real captured attestation before submission
